name: Parmesan Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir dressing, parmesan cheese, and seasoning together.
2. Place chicken on grill or rack of broiler pan.
3. Grill or broil for 8 to 10 minutes. Brush with half of the sauce during the last 3 minutes.
4. Turn chicken and continue grilling or broiling for another 8 to 10 minutes, or until tender.
5. Brush with remaining sauce during the last 3 minutes.
6. Makes 4 servings. Prep time: 5 minutes Cooking time: 20 minutes
